title: Aavalum Naanum
desc: Rajinikanth falls in love with Leela, his sister's friend. They set out on a road trip and meet with an accident, which exposes both their secrets.

title: Theeya Velai Seiyyanum Kumaru
desc: Kumar falls for Sanjana and seeks guidance from Mokia, a love guru, to win her heart. However, things take a dramatic turn when Sanjana turns out to be Mokia's sister.

title: Mikhael
desc: When rival gang members are killed mysteriously, the police begin an investigation. Later, their probe leads them to a physician who is seeking retribution.

title: Meter
desc: Arjun Kalyan reluctantly becomes a police officer at the insistence of his father. However, his attitude begins to change when he gets into a conflict with the home minister of his state.

title: Pokkiri Paiyan
desc: After leaving a criminal in Hong Kong, a man sets up his own gang. Later, he is tempted by an offer to execute his former employer.

title: Super Hit Songs
desc: A comprehensive compilation of the greatest super hit songs is played back to back in order to entertain and enthrall the audience.

title: Super Hit Songs
desc: A comprehensive compilation of the greatest super hit songs is played back to back in order to entertain and enthrall the audience.

title: Das Ka Dhamki
desc: A financially struggling waiter's life drastically changes course when he learns of his rich lookalike, the CEO of a pharmaceutical company.

title: Kaaviya Thalaivan
desc: Two rival artists at Sivadas Swamigal's drama troupe compete in everything they do. While one of them goes on to become successful, the other fails in life.

title: Mannarkudi Veeran
desc: Siddhartha, a courageous District Commissioner, goes against a notorious local politician.

title: Knock Off
desc: Fashion designer Marcus Ray sells knockoff jeans in Hong Kong, but faces challenges from his CIA partners. When KGB and Russian double agents enter the fray, it further complicates the matter.

title: Mayanginen
desc: Vijay, a budding cartoonist, is not fond of movie stars. However, things get complicated when he falls for Sameera, an actress.

title: Yaathisai
desc: Tired of leading a nomadic lifestyle, a young warrior of the Einar clan rages a revolt against Ranadheera Pandiyan. However, his lust for power and wealth leads him to misery.

title: Ustaad Ram
desc: When identical twins reunite after parting ways during their childhood, they find themselves trapped in a labyrinth of secrets, deception and crime.
